summary: Completed testing for Iteration 26 - Price Comparison Page. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend CompetitorPriceCatalog component working correctly with all features verified.
critical_code_review_comments: CompetitorPriceCatalog component properly fetches products from /api/shopify/products
Bulk lookup API (/api/competitor/bulk-lookup) correctly returns competitor analyses for multiple products
Filter dropdown works correctly (All Products, Analyzed Only, Not Analyzed, Competitors Cheaper)
Price difference badge shows correct colors: green for 'higher' (your price > competitor), red for 'lower'
Competitor column shows domain name with external link icon
Competitor price displayed in INR (converted from original currency)
Analyze All button triggers bulk analysis with toast notification
Individual analyze button works with loading spinner state
NotificationBell component integrated with unread count badge
Pagination working correctly (Page X of Y)
Sidebar link present under '1688 Sourcing' section
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products and competitor analyses
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 tested Price Comparison page at /price-comparison. Key features verified: 1) Table displays all Shopify products with columns (Product, Your Price, Competitor, Competitor Price, Difference, Actions), 2) Bulk lookup API fetches competitor data for multiple products, 3) Filter dropdown works (All Products, Analyzed Only, Not Analyzed, Competitors Cheaper), 4) Price difference badge shows correct colors (green=higher, red=lower), 5) Competitor domain shows as clickable link, 6) Analyze All button triggers bulk analysis, 7) Individual analyze button works. Sidebar link is under '1688 Sourcing' section.

price_badge_colors.green_badge: Shows when your price is higher than competitor (e.g., '99% higher')
price_badge_colors.red_badge: Shows when your price is lower than competitor

competitor_display.domain_link: Shows domain name (e.g., 'ebay.com') with external link icon
competitor_display.price_in_inr: Competitor price converted and displayed in INR (₹)
